en: Hey, hey, how was the first day? Oh, excellent.
See, it pays to know the man who wears my shoes. Me.
ko: 거봐, 내 신발 신는 사람을 아는 게 도움이 되지. 나 말이야.

en: No, I didn't tell anybody that I knew you. Why not? Well, because, you know,
ko: 아니, 나 너 안다고 아무한테도 안 말했어. 왜? 음, 왜냐면.

en: I thought you knew that. No. Who doesn't like me? Everyone.
ko: 너도 알고 있는 줄 알았어. 아니. 누가 날 안 좋아하는데? 다들.

en: What are you talking about? Don't feel bad.
You know, they used to like you a lot.
But then you got promoted, and, you know,
now you're all like Mr. Bossman. You know, Mr. Bing. Mr. Bing, Bossman Bing.
ko: 이제 완전 '미스터 보스맨'이 된 거야. 미스터 빙. 보스맨 빙.

en: I can't believe it. Yeah, yeah, they even do you.
ko: 믿을 수가 없어. 응, 응, 걔네가 너 흉내도 내.

en: You know, like, um, okay, um,
could that report be any later? Oh!
ko: "그 보고서 더 늦을 수 있나?" 오!

en: I don't sound like that. Oh, oh, Joe. Yeah, you do.
ko: 나 그렇게 안 하거든. 아, 아, 조. 아니, 그러거든.
